description: Take a raw source DataFrame and generate Data Vault 2.0 Hub / Link / Satellite tables with system columns (hash_key, load_date, record_source, hash_diff). Emits 2-3 assets per config: <entity>_hub, <entity>_sat, and optionally <entity>_link. Each asset is independently materializable via SDA — see lineage back to the raw source.

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Raw source DataFrame asset key to consume.

business_keys.label: Business Keys
business_keys.description: Business key column(s) that identify the entity in the source.

satellite_columns.label: Satellite Columns
satellite_columns.description: Descriptive columns that go into the satellite.

link_business_keys.label: Link Business Keys
link_business_keys.description: If provided, emit a <entity>_link asset. Usually business keys of both endpoints.

record_source.label: Record Source
record_source.description: Value populated in the record_source system column.

asset_key_prefix.label: Asset Key Prefix
asset_key_prefix.description: Optional prefix segments prepended to every emitted asset key.
